commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer runtime validation for an open security-sensitive PR, not a source repair ClawSweeper can create.; Cleared: The diff tightens Convex moderation-state checks and adds tests/spec coverage without adding dependencies, scripts, secret handling, workflow permissions, or package-resolution changes. (sha=762bf1bb7d8cd5ad5bae13d2854f42d2d6744ac6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Convex ban/unban skill batches so stale unban restore pages abort after a later ban or deactivation, preserves newer ban markers, and adds focused tests plus moderation spec and changelog notes.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, not from a live run: current main can restore old `user.banned` rows by timestamp without re-reading owner state, and later bans currently skip already soft-deleted skills instead of moving the ban marker forward.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer runtime validation for an open security-sensitive PR, not a source repair ClawSweeper can create.

target.title: fix: abort stale unban skill restore batches
target.body:
## Summary

Hardens user-unban restore batches so stale pages cannot undo a later ban or deactivation.

## What changed

- Unban skill-restore pages abort when the user has already been banned/deactivated again.
- Later ban markers are monotonic; older delayed ban pages cannot roll `softDeletedAt` back from a newer ban timestamp.
- Removed rows are not retimestamped or restored.

## Public behavior

Unban restore is fail-closed. If a restore page is stale because the user was banned or deactivated again, the page aborts instead of restoring old state.

Ban-hidden rows keep the newer ban marker. Removed rows remain removed.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from stale ban/unban restore batch behavior:

```text
$ vitest run convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "retimestamps earlier ban-hidden skills|does not retimestamp removed ban-hidden skills|does not roll newer ban markers back|aborts stale unban restore pages|continues unban restore pages|does not restore removed ban-hidden skills"

✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > retimestamps earlier ban-hidden skills during a later ban
✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > does not retimestamp removed ban-hidden skills during a later ban
✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > does not roll newer ban markers back when stale ban pages run late
✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > aborts stale unban restore pages when the owner was banned again
✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > continues unban restore pages while the owner is active
✓ convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts > skills ban/unban batches > does not restore removed ban-hidden skills

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  6 passed (6)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/skills.banBatches.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       6 passed (6)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  205 passed (205)
Tests       1991 passed (1991)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
